items.briefing:
Several cybersecurity vendors are expanding their presence in Australia this week. Coro has signed a local distribution deal through Leader, making its security platform more accessible to Australian businesses. Separately, Rubrik and MEDITECH have partnered to strengthen cyber resilience for hospitals — relevant for Australian healthcare organisations facing growing cyber threats.

On the broader security front, a virtual event this week covered how organisations should respond when a data breach occurs — a practical reminder to review your own incident response plan before you need it. **Tip:** Make sure your organisation has a documented, up-to-date data breach response plan that staff know how to follow.

featured.title: WFI says only a quarter of Australian farmers are considering cyber insurance
featured.quote: Only 25% of Australian farmers consider cyber insurance, revealing critical vulnerability in food supply chain.
